name: Trentenaires
overview: Trentenaires ("in their thirties" in french), it's the story of a close group of friends who share everything since their party years at Enzo's. First loves, first cries, important promises and griefs. They are now in their thirties, the age where you hope, you enjoy, you share everything with your loved ones... but also the age where you first think, search, and where it's sometimes difficult to be yourself.

trailers.title: Sur le tournage de la série Trentenaires
